basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Staff Nurse DV Schedule 2026 - DV Dates, Venue & Instructions
basic_details.short_information: Before diving into the schedule, here is a quick summary of the key details of the BFUHS Staff Nurse recruitment drive for 2026.

important_instructions: Candidates must carefully read and follow all instructions issued by BFUHS before attending the document verification. Non-compliance with any instruction may result in cancellation of candidature.

Personal appearance is mandatory. No proxy or representative will be allowed to attend on behalf of the candidate. Candidates must appear on the exact date and time mentioned against their name in the shortlist. No separate intimation will be sent by the university. Candidates who appeared for DV under the Open (UR) Category need not appear again under a reserved category. The last date to submit any eligibility-related document is 08 July 2026. No document will be accepted after this date. Appearing for DV does not guarantee selection. Eligibility will be determined after thorough scrutiny by the verification committee. If any certificate or document is found to be fake, forged, or issued by an incompetent authority, the candidature will be cancelled with immediate effect and legal action will be taken. No TA/DA (Travel Allowance / Daily Allowance) will be paid to any candidate for attending the document verification. For any updates or changes, candidates must regularly visit the official university website: www.bfuhs.ac.in.

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Overview
content_sections.text: Before diving into the schedule, here is a quick summary of the key details of the BFUHS Staff Nurse recruitment drive for 2026.

rows.information: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS), Faridkot

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Staff Nurse DV Date & Venue 2026
content_sections.text: The document verification for BFUHS Staff Nurse 2026 will be conducted at a single centralised venue. Candidates must report strictly as per the date and time mentioned against their name in the official shortlist published on the university website. DV Dates: 27 June 2026 to 06 July 2026 Reporting Time: 9:30 AM (first slot) and 12:00 PM (second slot) as per individual schedule Venue: Auditorium, Guru Gobind Singh Medical College (GGS Medical College), Faridkot Candidate List: Available on the official university website at www.bfuhs.ac.in

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for BFUHS Staff Nurse DV 2026
content_sections.text: All shortlisted candidates must bring their original documents along with one self-attested photocopy set for document verification. Missing documents may lead to disqualification. The following documents are mandatory: Printout of the Online Application Form filled at the time of applying Admit Card cum Roll Number Slip Valid Photo Identity Proof (Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, Voter ID, Passport, etc.) Date of Birth proof (Matriculation Certificate or equivalent) Proof of passing Punjabi at the Matriculation level All academic certificates and mark sheets No Objection Certificate (NOC) issued by the employer, if currently employed on a regular basis under any Government Department Category / Caste Certificate (if applicable - SC, BC, EWS, etc.) Experience Certificate (if applicable) LDC Certificate issued by the concerned department (for Ex-Serviceman LDC applicants) Gradation Certificate issued by the Department of Sports, Govt. of Punjab (for Sports category applicants)

content_sections.heading: Counselling Fee for BFUHS Staff Nurse 2026
content_sections.text: A counselling fee is payable on the spot at the document verification venue. Candidates should carry the exact amount in cash to avoid any inconvenience. General / Other Category candidates: Rs. 1,000/- SC Category candidates: Rs. 500/-

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for BFUHS Staff Nurse DV 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must carefully read and follow all instructions issued by BFUHS before attending the document verification. Non-compliance with any instruction may result in cancellation of candidature. Personal appearance is mandatory. No proxy or representative will be allowed to attend on behalf of the candidate. Candidates must appear on the exact date and time mentioned against their name in the shortlist. No separate intimation will be sent by the university. Candidates who appeared for DV under the Open (UR) Category need not appear again under a reserved category. The last date to submit any eligibility-related document is 08 July 2026. No document will be accepted after this date. Appearing for DV does not guarantee selection. Eligibility will be determined after thorough scrutiny by the verification committee. If any certificate or document is found to be fake, forged, or issued by an incompetent authority, the candidature will be cancelled with immediate effect and legal action will be taken. No TA/DA (Travel Allowance / Daily Allowance) will be paid to any candidate for attending the document verification. For any updates or changes, candidates must regularly visit the official university website: www.bfuhs.ac.in.

content_sections.heading: How to Check Your DV Date on the BFUHS Official Website
content_sections.text: The complete list of shortlisted candidates along with their individual DV date and time has been uploaded on the BFUHS official website. Follow these steps to find your schedule: Visit the official BFUHS website at www.bfuhs.ac.in Look for the latest notification or recruitment section on the homepage Find the link for "Staff Nurse DV List - Advt. No. BFU-26/04" Download the PDF and search for your Roll Number or Name Note your assigned date and reporting time (9:30 AM or 12:00 PM)

faq.question: Q1. What is the BFUHS Staff Nurse DV date 2026?
faq.answer: The BFUHS Staff Nurse Document Verification is scheduled from 27 June 2026 to 06 July 2026. Each candidate has been assigned a specific date and time based on their category and marks scored in the written test.

faq.question: Q2. Where will the BFUHS Staff Nurse DV 2026 be held?
faq.answer: The document verification will be held at the Auditorium, Guru Gobind Singh Medical College (GGS Medical College), Faridkot, Punjab.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum cutoff for the UR category in BFUHS Staff Nurse 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates from the Unreserved (UR) / General category must have scored 66 marks or above in the written test to be called for document verification.

faq.question: Q4. What documents are required for BFUHS Staff Nurse DV 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry originals and one set of self-attested photocopies of their application printout, admit card, photo ID, age proof, Punjabi at Matric proof, academic certificates, category certificate (if applicable), NOC from employer (if in government service), and experience certificate.

faq.question: Q5. What is the counselling fee for BFUHS Staff Nurse DV 2026?
faq.answer: The counselling fee is Rs. 1,000/- for General/Other category candidates and Rs. 500/- for SC category candidates. This fee is to be paid on the spot at the DV venue.

faq.question: What is the BFUHS Staff Nurse DV date 2026?
faq.answer: The BFUHS Staff Nurse Document Verification is scheduled from 27 June 2026 to 06 July 2026. Each candidate has been assigned a specific date and time based on their category and marks scored in the written test.

faq.question: Where will the BFUHS Staff Nurse DV 2026 be held?
faq.answer: The document verification will be held at the Auditorium, Guru Gobind Singh Medical College (GGS Medical College), Faridkot, Punjab.

faq.answer: Candidates from the Unreserved (UR) / General category must have scored 66 marks or above in the written test to be called for document verification.

faq.answer: The counselling fee is Rs. 1,000/- for General/Other category candidates and Rs. 500/- for SC category candidates. This fee is to be paid on the spot at the DV venue.
